posts.title: docker（二）
posts.text: docker products docker Hub docker Desktop docker Engine docker-compose Docker App Docker EngineDocker Engine是具有以下主要组件的客户端-服务器应用程序： 服务器是一种长期运行的程序，称为守护程序进程（dockerd命令）。 REST API，它指定程序可以用来与守护程序进行通信并指示其操作的接口。 命令行界面（CLI）客户端（dockerd命令）。

posts.title: HTTP Authentication
posts.text: HTTP AuthenticationRFC 7235定义了一个HTTP认证框架 HTTP Authentication schemes Basic See RFC 7617, base64-encoded credentials. More information below. Bearer See RFC 6750, bearer tokens to access OAuth 2.0-protected resources Digest See RFC 7616, only md5 hashing is supported in Firefox, see bug 472823 for SHA encryption support HOBA See RFC 7486, Section 3, HTTP Origin-Bound Authentication, digital-signature-based Mutual See RFC 8120 AWS4-HMAC-SHA256 See AWS docs 认证实例分析github认证方案github web端登录使用form表单用户名密码登录请求方法: POST请求URL: https://github.com/sessionContent-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencodedformdata: 1234567891011121314commit: Sign inauthenticity_token: D89KiIjphvAwbpLYklezxX3ggtsIWyVBZ7XHY4TWNJjyFAuYbOnX/4Kb6VJlX8vELuHnwHw5xWPMRocscXzTfQ==ga_id: 2037945766.1601015362login: 332207252@qq.compassword: zyx1227520webauthn-support: supportedwebauthn-iuvpaa-support: unsupportedreturn_to: allow_signup: client_id: integration: required_field_de1d: timestamp: 1602040076674timestamp_secret: def64c8f95d251f448bd163d6eff3ca2f17df31be14cc67482bf5972ce8466c9 登录成功后重定向状态代码: 302 Foundresponse header 1Location: https://github.com cookie中有user_session存储会话登录状态，并设有过期时间 github web登录使用传统form表单，提交用户名密码（htts协议，请求体里明文）登录，没有验证码（多次失败后会被ban ip和尝试的账号一定时间），cookie-seesion机制自定义cookie值user_session保持登录 github appgithub官方app登录GitHub for androidversion: 1.2.21app内点击登录从浏览器打开，请求oauth授权在请求头中设置oauth令牌(Authorization: token oauth令牌)，访问rest api也就是说github官方app也是用oauth应用 github rest api构建 OAuth 应用程序 google认证方案百度认证方案gitee认证gitee web登录页面请求 URL: https://gitee.com/login请求方法: GET 登录请求请求 URL: https://gitee.com/login请求方法: POSTformdata 1234567encrypt_key: passwordutf8: ✓authenticity_token: 8eUxhIhzjguJMEj+Xdwg1d3npFUgcbnDPCKDKw5jToY=redirect_to_url: /signupuser[login]: 332207252@qq.comencrypt_data[user[password]]: rKmvuBnGFtwXQKlDCHIdA32aLD3tK0/nsXmat6hDlcXfbjeYyrWUBtn+pvB8/Vi6FCwWOofxguPtn2ZbydscwOstIp7bI1/C8UyBtbKt3aPvEDZCCvqzUxUI/ii230X73suH9ZITZ9Qr6xNEgS2blRGIJPQ8XfiL+dbYndJPwCM=user[remember_me]: 0 登录成功状态代码: 302 Foundresponse header 1Location: http://gitee.com/signup 请求 URL: http://gitee.com/signup请求方法: GET状态代码: 301 Moved Permanentlyresponse header 1Location: https://gitee.com/signup 请求 URL: https://gitee.com/signup请求方法: GET状态代码: 302 Foundresponse header 1Location: http://gitee.com/ 请求 URL: http://gitee.com/请求方法: GET状态代码: 301 Moved Permanentlyresponse header 1Location: https://gitee.com/ 请求 URL: https://gitee.com/请求方法: GET状态代码: 200 OK gitee appgitee app for android V1.6.6-releasegit repository: https://gitee.com/oschina/git-osc-android.git authroization（登录认证）请求 URL: https://gitee.com/api/v3/session请求方法: POSTQuery Params: email=username&password=password HTTP status 201 Createdresponse body 123456789101112131415161718192021222324{ "id": 4792495, "username": "qminer", "name": "qminer", "bio": null, "weibo": null, "blog": null, "theme_id": 1, "state": "active", "created_at": "2019-01-25T11:11:02+08:00", "portrait_url": "no_portrait.png#qminer-qminer", "new_portrait": "https://gitee.com/assets/no_portrait.png", "follow": { "followers": 1, "starred": 28, "following": 0, "watched": 3 }, "private_token": "授权令牌", "is_admin": false, "can_create_group": true, "can_create_project": true, "can_create_team": true} access(访问受限接口)获取用户仓库请求 URL: https://gitee.com/api/v3/projects/请求方法: GETQuery Params: page=1&private_token=令牌 oauthcoding认证

posts.title: springboot日志
posts.text: spring 日志 SpringBoot的官方文档中这样描述 Spring Boot uses Commons Logging for all internal logging but leaves the underlying log implementation open. Default configurations are provided for Java Util Logging, Log4J2, and Logback. In each case, loggers are pre-configured to use console output with optional file output also available. By default, if you use the “Starters”, Logback is used for logging. Appropriate Logback routing is also included to ensure that dependent libraries that use Java Util Logging, Commons Logging, Log4J, or SLF4J all work correctly. 由此可知这几点 SpringBoot框架内部使用JCL（Jakarta Commons Logging）进行所有内部日志记录， JCL是日志门面，SpringBoot将底层日志实现保持打开状态。提供Java Util Logging, Log4J2, and Logback这几种日志实现框架的默认配置 SpringBoot默认预先配置在控制台输出，也可以文件输出 如果使用“Starters”，也就是Springboot启动器，默认使用Logback作为日志实现，还包括适当的Logback路由，以确保使用Java Util Logging，Commons Logging，Log4J或SLF4J的从属库均能正常工作。 SpringBoot内部使用JCLSpringBoot的”Starters”:spring-boot-starter将会导入 org.springframework.boot:spring-boot org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-logging jakarta.annotation:jakarta.annotation-api org.springframework:spring-core org.yaml:snakeyaml 其中spring-core依赖spring-jcl spring-jcl是什么包？Spring Java Doc(https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/docs/current/javadoc-api/org/apache/commons/logging/package-summary.html)文档中spring-jcl下的包org.apache.commons.logging与org.apache.commons.logging.impl的包描述 Spring’s variant of the Commons Logging API: with special support for Log4J 2, SLF4J and java.util.logging. This is a custom bridge along the lines of jcl-over-slf4j. You may exclude spring-jcl and switch to jcl-over-slf4j instead if you prefer the hard-bound SLF4J bridge. However, Spring’s own bridge provides a better out-of-the-box experience when using Log4J 2 or java.util.logging, with no extra bridge jars necessary, and also easier setup of SLF4J with Logback (no JCL exclude, no JCL bridge). Log is equivalent to the original. However, LogFactory is a very different implementation which is minimized and optimized for Spring’s purposes, detecting Log4J 2.x and SLF4J 1.7 in the framework classpath and falling back to java.util.logging. If you run into any issues with this implementation, consider excluding spring-jcl and switching to the standard commons-logging artifact or to jcl-over-slf4j. Note that this Commons Logging bridge is only meant to be used for framework logging purposes, both in the core framework and in extensions. For applications, prefer direct use of Log4J/SLF4J or java.util.logging. TODO : 翻译说明Spring-jcl是JCL的Spring变体，是一个类似于jcl-over-slf4j的自定义的日志桥，也就是将JCL的API，重定向到slf4j。如果您更喜欢硬绑定SLF4J桥，则可以排除spring-jcl并切换到jcl-over-slf4j。但是，当使用Log4J 2或java.util.logging时，Spring自己的桥接器提供了更好的开箱即用体验，不需要额外的桥接器，也更容易通过Logback设置SLF4J（不用排除JCL，也不用JCL桥） 请注意，此Commons Logging bridge仅用于核心框架和扩展中的框架日志记录目的。对于应用程序，最好直接使用Log4J / SLF4J或java.util.logging。TODO : 解释这句话（就是说Spring框架内部使用jcl api，而我们写的外部内容最好直接使用log4j、slf4j或者jul的api） spring-jcl api -> SpringBoot提供的日志默认配置Spring-JCL.jarspring-boot-starter-logging log4j-api包中的org.apache.logging.log4j.spi.ExtendedLogger存在log4j-to-slf4j包中的org.apache.logging.slf4j.SLF4JProvider存在slf4j-api包中的org.slf4j.spi.LocationAwareLogger存在slf4j-api包中的org.slf4j.Logger 1234567891011121314<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <exclusions> <exclusion> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-logging</artifactId> </exclusion> </exclusions> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-log4j2</artifactId> </dependency> spring-boot-starter-log4j2 log4j-api包中的org.apache.logging.log4j.spi.ExtendedLogger存在log4j-to-slf4j包中的org.apache.logging.slf4j.SLF4JProvider不存在slf4j-api包中的org.slf4j.spi.LocationAwareLogger存在slf4j-api包中的org.slf4j.Logger LogAdapter.java jcl的底层实现有？log4j log4j2log4j log4j2 区别 同一个包不同版本号？slf4j-log4j12的桥接器桥接哪个log4j/log4j2哪个版本，都可以桥接？

posts.title: HTTP Authentication
posts.text: HTTP Authentication在了解Spring Security认证之前，可以了解一下有关于HTTP认证模式 HTTP Authentication Schemes RFC 7235 The general HTTP authentication framework Basic See RFC 7617, base64-encoded credentials. More information below. Bearer See RFC 6750, bearer tokens to access OAuth 2.0-protected resources Digest See RFC 7616, only md5 hashing is supported in Firefox, see bug 472823 for SHA encryption support HOBA See RFC 7486, Section 3, HTTP Origin-Bound Authentication, digital-signature-based Mutual See RFC 8120 AWS4-HMAC-SHA256 See AWS docs SpringSecurity AuthenticationSpringSecurity把认证分为 Username/Password Authentication oauth2 Authentication Username/Password AuthenticationUsername/Password Authentication就是最常见形式，用户提供用户名和密码给后台用于认证。该模式下主要流程就是 用户提供用户名和密码，发送请求到服务器。 服务器后台接收用户请求并读取用户名和密码。 后台再根据获取到的用户名和密码到存储用户和密码的地方对比实现认证。 返回认证结果 Spring Security根据从用户请求中读取用户名和密码的不同，提供以下读取机制 Form Login Basic Authentication Digest Authentication Spring Security提供了以下用户名密码存储机制 Simple Storage with In-Memory Authentication Relational Databases with JDBC Authentication Custom data stores with UserDetailsService LDAP storage with LDAP Authentication 每种读取机制都可以任意搭配一种存储机制 读取机制Form LoginBasic AuthenticationSpring Security的Basic Authentication是对HTTP Basic Authentication rfc7617的实现 Digest AuthenticationSpring Security的Digest Authentication是对HTTP Digest Authentication rfc7616的实现 存储机制InMemoryUserDetailsManagerjdbcAuthenticationuserDetailsServiceldapAuthentication

posts.title: SpringSecurity-oauth
posts.text: OAuth2AuthorizationRequestRedirectFilterOAuth2LoginAuthenticationFilter DefaultOAuth2AuthorizationRequestResolver 用户(浏览器、app) –（(authorizationEndpoint)http://localhost:8080/oauth2/authorization/github）--> 服务器 服务器重定向(authorizationEndpoint)http://localhost:8080/oauth2/authorization/github）到授权服务器认证接口，其中参数redirect_uri为（(redirectionEndpoint)http://localhost:8080/login/oauth2/code/） 用户访问授权服务器认证接口地址（https://github.com/login/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=5228dcf5eaeff66b293f&scope=read:user&state=Zw58dqmfrunGbrT9Kx8TLRIG_KLryWYYzAsVzoqNvWI%3D&redirect_uri=http://localhost:8080/login/oauth2/code/github） 用户允许授权，授权服务器重定向到访问授权服务器时redirect_uri参数指定的重定向地址（http://localhost:8080/login/oauth2/code/github?code=d82fe67afe99b4419a91&state=Zw58dqmfrunGbrT9Kx8TLRIG_KLryWYYzAsVzoqNvWI%3D） 服务器处理上面重定向地址的请求，访问授权服务器获取授权服务器token，授权服务器token与服务器建立关联 用户

posts.title: 字符编码
posts.text: asciiunicode通用字符集（Universal Character Set, UCS）UCS-2,UCS-4utfANSI \u 表示unicode编码\x 表示utf8编码值

posts.title: SpringSecurity的启动
posts.text: Spring提供了一些注解来快速启用SpringSecurity的某些功能 @EnableWebSecurity 启动SpringSecurity保护Servlet Web应用WebSecurity @EnableRSocketSecurity RSocketSecurity 注解@EnableWebSecurity12345678910111213141516@Retention(value = java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)@Target(value = { java.lang.annotation.ElementType.TYPE })@Documented@Import({ WebSecurityConfiguration.class, SpringWebMvcImportSelector.class, OAuth2ImportSelector.class })@EnableGlobalAuthentication@Configurationpublic @interface EnableWebSecurity { /** * Controls debugging support for Spring Security. Default is false. * @return if true, enables debug support with Spring Security */ boolean debug() default false;} EnableWebSecurity导入了三个类WebSecurityConfiguration、SpringWebMvcImportSelector和OAuth2ImportSelector WebSecurityConfigurationWebSecurityConfiguration的作用是使用WebSecurity来创建FilterChainProxy和创建AuthenticationManager WebSecurityConfiguration的springSecurityFilterChain()方法 1234567891011121314151617/** * Creates the Spring Security Filter Chain * @return the {@link Filter} that represents the security filter chain * @throws Exception */@Bean(name = AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME)public Filter springSecurityFilterChain() throws Exception { boolean hasConfigurers = webSecurityConfigurers != null && !webSecurityConfigurers.isEmpty(); if (!hasConfigurers) { WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter adapter = objectObjectPostProcessor .postProcess(new WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter() { }); webSecurity.apply(adapter); } return webSecurity.build();} springSecurityFilterChain()方法内，首先判断是否存在配置WebSecurity的配置类WebSecurityConfigurer，如果不存在则使用WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter创建一个（WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter继承WebSecurityConfigurer），最后webSecurity调用父类AbstractConfiguredSecurityBuilder的父类AbstractSecurityBuilder的build()方法构建FilterChainProxy AbstractSecurityBuilder的build()方法 123456789101112/** (non-Javadoc)** @see org.springframework.security.config.annotation.SecurityBuilder#build()*/public final O build() throws Exception { if (this.building.compareAndSet(false, true)) { this.object = doBuild(); return this.object; } throw new AlreadyBuiltException("This object has already been built");} AbstractSecurityBuilder的build()方法中调用doBuild()方法，doBuild()由AbstractConfiguredSecurityBuilder实现 AbstractConfiguredSecurityBuilder的doBuild()方法 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334/*** Executes the build using the {@link SecurityConfigurer}'s that have been applied* using the following steps:** <ul>* <li>Invokes {@link #beforeInit()} for any subclass to hook into</li>* <li>Invokes {@link SecurityConfigurer#init(SecurityBuilder)} for any* {@link SecurityConfigurer} that was applied to this builder.</li>* <li>Invokes {@link #beforeConfigure()} for any subclass to hook into</li>* <li>Invokes {@link #performBuild()} which actually builds the Object</li>* </ul>*/@Overrideprotected final O doBuild() throws Exception { synchronized (configurers) { buildState = BuildState.INITIALIZING; beforeInit(); init(); buildState = BuildState.CONFIGURING; beforeConfigure(); configure(); buildState = BuildState.BUILDING; O result = performBuild(); buildState = BuildState.BUILT; return result; }} 在AbstractConfiguredSecurityBuilder的doBuild()方法中，调用了beforeInit()、init()、beforeConfigure()、configure()和performBuild()方法 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445/*** Invoked prior to invoking each {@link SecurityConfigurer#init(SecurityBuilder)}* method. Subclasses may override this method to hook into the lifecycle without* using a {@link SecurityConfigurer}.*/protected void beforeInit() throws Exception {}/*** Invoked prior to invoking each* {@link SecurityConfigurer#configure(SecurityBuilder)} method. Subclasses may* override this method to hook into the lifecycle without using a* {@link SecurityConfigurer}.*/protected void beforeConfigure() throws Exception {}/*** Subclasses must implement this method to build the object that is being returned.** @return the Object to be buit or null if the implementation allows it*/protected abstract O performBuild() throws Exception;@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")private void init() throws Exception { Collection<SecurityConfigurer<O, B>> configurers = getConfigurers(); for (SecurityConfigurer<O, B> configurer : configurers) { configurer.init((B) this); } for (SecurityConfigurer<O, B> configurer : configurersAddedInInitializing) { configurer.init((B) this); }}@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")private void configure() throws Exception { Collection<SecurityConfigurer<O, B>> configurers = getConfigurers(); for (SecurityConfigurer<O, B> configurer : configurers) { configurer.configure((B) this); }} init()方法调用所有SecurityConfigurer配置类的init(B builder)方法初始化builder，这里就是WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter调用init(final WebSecurity web)方法初始化WebSecurity configure()方法调用所有SecurityConfigurer配置类的configure(B builder)方法配置builder，这里就是WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter调用configure(WebSecurity web)方法配置WebSecurity performBuild()方法由WebSecurity类实现，执行构建FilterChainProxy WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter的init(final WebSecurity web)与configure(WebSecurity web)相关方法 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485868788899091929394959697public void init(final WebSecurity web) throws Exception { final HttpSecurity http = getHttp(); web.addSecurityFilterChainBuilder(http).postBuildAction(() -> { FilterSecurityInterceptor securityInterceptor = http .getSharedObject(FilterSecurityInterceptor.class); web.securityInterceptor(securityInterceptor); });}/*** Creates the {@link HttpSecurity} or returns the current instance** ] * @return the {@link HttpSecurity}* @throws Exception*/@SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" })protected final HttpSecurity getHttp() throws Exception { if (http != null) { return http; } AuthenticationEventPublisher eventPublisher = getAuthenticationEventPublisher(); localConfigureAuthenticationBldr.authenticationEventPublisher(eventPublisher); AuthenticationManager authenticationManager = authenticationManager(); authenticationBuilder.parentAuthenticationManager(authenticationManager); Map<Class<?>, Object> sharedObjects = createSharedObjects(); http = new HttpSecurity(objectPostProcessor, authenticationBuilder, sharedObjects); if (!disableDefaults) { // @formatter:off http .csrf().and() .addFilter(new WebAsyncManagerIntegrationFilter()) .exceptionHandling().and() .headers().and() .sessionManagement().and() .securityContext().and() .requestCache().and() .anonymous().and() .servletApi().and() .apply(new DefaultLoginPageConfigurer<>()).and() .logout(); // @formatter:on ClassLoader classLoader = this.context.getClassLoader(); List<AbstractHttpConfigurer> defaultHttpConfigurers = SpringFactoriesLoader.loadFactories(AbstractHttpConfigurer.class, classLoader); for (AbstractHttpConfigurer configurer : defaultHttpConfigurers) { http.apply(configurer); } } configure(http); return http;}/*** Override this method to configure the {@link HttpSecurity}. Typically subclasses* should not invoke this method by calling super as it may override their* configuration. The default configuration is:** <pre>* http.authorizeRequests().anyRequest().authenticated().and().formLogin().and().httpBasic();* </pre>** Any endpoint that requires defense against common vulnerabilities can be specified here, including public ones.* See {@link HttpSecurity#authorizeRequests} and the `permitAll()` authorization rule* for more details on public endpoints.** @param http the {@link HttpSecurity} to modify* @throws Exception if an error occurs*/// @formatter:offprotected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { logger.debug("Using default configure(HttpSecurity). If subclassed this will potentially override subclass configure(HttpSecurity)."); http .authorizeRequests() .anyRequest().authenticated() .and() .formLogin().and() .httpBasic();}// @formatter:on/*** Override this method to configure {@link WebSecurity}. For example, if you wish to* ignore certain requests.** Endpoints specified in this method will be ignored by Spring Security, meaning it* will not protect them from CSRF, XSS, Clickjacking, and so on.** Instead, if you want to protect endpoints against common vulnerabilities, then see* {@link #configure(HttpSecurity)} and the {@link HttpSecurity#authorizeRequests}* configuration method.*/public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception {} WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter的init(final WebSecurity web)方法以及调用的其他一系列方法创建了HttpSecurity，提供了HttpSecurity默认配置并通过子类重写configure(HttpSecurity http)方法实现开发者自定义HttpSecurity的配置，除此之外init(final WebSecurity web)方法内还创建了FilterSecurityInterceptor 在WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter的getHttp()方法中，调用了authenticationManager()方法创建AuthenticationManager 1234567891011121314protected AuthenticationManager authenticationManager() throws Exception { if (!authenticationManagerInitialized) { configure(localConfigureAuthenticationBldr); if (disableLocalConfigureAuthenticationBldr) { authenticationManager = authenticationConfiguration .getAuthenticationManager(); } else { authenticationManager = localConfigureAuthenticationBldr.build(); } authenticationManagerInitialized = true; } return authenticationManager;} 在authenticationManager()方法中，调用configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder auth)方法配置localConfigureAuthenticationBldr，该方法可以被重写，因此开发者可自定义配置localConfigureAuthenticationBldr，并通过disableLocalConfigureAuthenticationBldr判断是否使用localConfigureAuthenticationBldr的配置来构建AuthenticationConfiguration，默认为true，如果不使用localConfigureAuthenticationBldr的配置，则调用AuthenticationConfiguration的getAuthenticationManager()方法构建AuthenticationManager SpringWebMvcImportSelectorOAuth2ImportSelectorOAuth2ImportSelector的作用是导入两个类当spring-security-oauth2-client在classpath上时，导入OAuth2ClientConfiguration当spring-security-oauth2-client或者spring-security-oauth2-resource-server，并且spring-webflux在classpath上时导入SecurityReactorContextConfiguration 注解@EnableRSocketSecurityTODO [] 为什么OAuth2ImportSelector要导入SecurityReactorContextConfiguration？ [] authenticationManager是如何注入到Spring容器的，为什么还有authenticationBuilder.parentAuthenticationManager(authenticationManager); [] AuthenticationEntryPoint的作用 [] tomcat启动，第一次访问，filter过滤链org.springframework.web.filter.DelegatingFilterProxy与org.apache.tomcat.websocket.server.WsFilter，DelegatingFilterProxy为spring的过滤链，Bean name是springSecurityFilterChain，单其属性delegate也就是spring的过滤链此时为空，第二次即以后访问才有值。

posts.title: docker（一）
posts.text: 虚拟化技术(Hypervisor)物理服务器只能部署单操作系统(或者说是只能运行单操作系统，笔记本上同时安装过Windows和Linux操作系统，只不过二者只能运行一个)，应用程序部署在操作系统中，通过操作系统来进行硬件资源的调用。 在虚拟化环境下，物理服务器的CPU、内存、硬盘和网卡等硬件资源被虚拟化并受Hypervisor的调度，多个操作系统在Hypervisor的协调下可以共享这些虚拟化后的硬件资源，同时每个操作系统又可以保存彼此的独立性。 虚拟化技术类型Bare-metal虚拟化与Host OS虚拟化根据Hypervisor所处层次的不同和Guest OS对硬件资源的不同使用方式，Hypervisor虚拟化被分为两种类型：Bare-metal虚拟化方式（“裸机”虚拟化）和Host OS虚拟化方式(基于操作系统的虚拟化，宿主型虚拟化)。 Host OS类型 VMware Workstation VirtualBox Bare-metal类型 PowerVM ESX Sevrer Citrix XenServer Hyper-V KVM XEN … 全虚拟化、准虚拟化与主机操作系统虚拟化虚拟化技术又分为全虚拟化（Full Virtualization，FV）、准虚拟化（Para Virtualization，PV）和主机操作系统虚拟化（Host OS Virtualization），其中PV和FV基于Bare-metal类型Hypervisor的虚拟化技术，而主机操作系统虚拟化基于Host OS类型Hypervisor的虚拟化技术。

posts.title: SpringSecurity-Overview
posts.text: 模块（Project Modules） Core - spring-security-core.jar Remoting - spring-security-remoting.jar Web - spring-security-web.jar Config - spring-security-config.jar LDAP - spring-security-ldap.jar OAuth 2.0 Core - spring-security-oauth2-core.jar OAuth 2.0 Client - spring-security-oauth2-client.jar OAuth 2.0 JOSE - spring-security-oauth2-jose.jar OAuth 2.0 Resource Server - spring-security-oauth2-resource-server.jar ACL - spring-security-acl.jar CAS - spring-security-cas.jar OpenID - spring-security-openid.jar Test - spring-security-test.jar

posts.title: SpringSecurity的配置
posts.text: 前言（Preface）配合springboot分析SpringSecirity的配置springboot 2.x.x 版本springsecurity 5.x.x 版本 导入依赖 通过springboot starts导入 1234567<dependencies> <!-- ... other dependency elements ... --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency></dependencies> 手动导入 1234567891011121314<dependencies> <!-- ... other dependency elements ... --> <!-- Spring Security Web支持 --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId> <artifactId>spring-security-web</artifactId> <version>4.2.13.RELEASE</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId> <artifactId>spring-security-config</artifactId> <version>4.2.13.RELEASE</version> </dependency></dependencies> springboot autoconfigure大体流程spring-boot-autocofigure自动配置启动springsecurity，实例化并注册自带配置类SecurityAutoConfiguration、创建一个UserDetailsS​​ervice和SecurityFilterAutoConfiguration。 SecurityAutoConfiguration主要作用是配置默认认证发布器DefaultAuthenticationEventPublisher，并映入SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration、WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration和SecurityDataConfiguration这三个配置类，SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration会根据是否以及有配置WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter的Bean来决定是否实例化自身并提供和注册Bean默认WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter的Bean;WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration则添加@EnableWebSecurity的注解来启用SpringSecurity的webSecurity 主要内容springboot的自动配置功能都集成在spring-boot-autocofigure.jar包下 在spring-boot-autocofigure.jar包中的META-INF/spring.factories，有关于spring-security的部分 12345678910111213org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.servlet.SecurityAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.servlet.UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.servlet.SecurityFilterAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.reactive.ReactiveSecurityAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.reactive.ReactiveUserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.rsocket.RSocketSecurityAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.saml2.Saml2RelyingPartyAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.sendgrid.SendGridAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.session.SessionAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.oauth2.client.servlet.OAuth2ClientAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.oauth2.client.reactive.ReactiveOAuth2ClientAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.oauth2.resource.servlet.OAuth2ResourceServerAutoConfiguration,\org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.oauth2.resource.reactive.ReactiveOAuth2ResourceServerAutoConfiguration,\ 其中有关于spring-security-web部分的有SecurityAutoConfiguration，UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration，SecurityFilterAutoConfiguration，springboot启动时会进行实例化并注入Spring IOC容器 Spring Boot Auto ConfigurationSpring Boot 自动地: 启用S​​pring Security的默认配置 启用S​​pring Security的默认配置，该配置将Servlet过滤器创建为名为springSecurityFilterChain的bean。此bean负责应用程序内的所有安全性（保护应用程序URL，验证提交的用户名和密码，重定向到登录表单等）。 spring-boot-autoconfigure模块中的org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.security.servlet包中有SecurityAutoConfiguration、WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration和SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration三个配置类。现在从启动时实例化并注入IOC容器的SecurityAutoConfiguration开始分析。 SecurityAutoConfiguration.class 12345678910111213141516171819202122// 声明SecurityAutoConfiguration为配置类并且是Full模式（SecurityAutoConfiguration内部的Bean之间不能存在依赖）@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)// 表示DefaultAuthenticationEventPublisher.class在类路径上存在时，SecurityAutoConfiguration才会实例化为Bean@ConditionalOnClass(DefaultAuthenticationEventPublisher.class)// 引入相关Properties@EnableConfigurationProperties(SecurityProperties.class)// 按顺序映入其他配置类并实例化为Bean。@Import({ SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration.class, WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration.class, SecurityDataConfiguration.class })public class SecurityAutoConfiguration { // AuthenticationEventPublisher.class在类路径上时，实例化Bean @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean(AuthenticationEventPublisher.class) public DefaultAuthenticationEventPublisher authenticationEventPublisher(ApplicationEventPublisher publisher) { return new DefaultAuthenticationEventPublisher(publisher); }} 有关于Configuration设置Bean的Full模式 SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration.class 1234567891011121314151617181920// 当Conditional之类的所有注解条件全部满足才会实例化Bean// 声明SecurityAutoConfiguration为配置类并且是 Full模式@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)// 当WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class在类路径上，则实例化Bean@ConditionalOnClass(WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class)// 当存在WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class的Bean时，则实例化为Bean@ConditionalOnMissingBean(WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class)// 当Web应用程序类型为SERVLET时，则实例化为Bean@ConditionalOnWebApplication(type = Type.SERVLET)public class SpringBootWebSecurityConfiguration { // DefaultConfigurerAdapter继承WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter，是Springboot提供的WebSecurityConfigurer的默认适配器。 // 声明DefaultConfigurerAdapter为配置类， @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false) // 设置定义顺序 @Order(SecurityProperties.BASIC_AUTH_ORDER) static class DefaultConfigurerAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { }} WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration.class 12345678910111213// 声明WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration为配置类并且是 Full模式@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)// 当WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class在类路径上，则实例化Bean@ConditionalOnBean(WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.class)// 当Bean name = BeanIds.SPRING_SECURITY_FILTER_CHAIN不存在时，则实例化Bean@ConditionalOnMissingBean(name = BeanIds.SPRING_SECURITY_FILTER_CHAIN)// 当Web应用程序类型为SERVLET时，则实例化为Bean@ConditionalOnWebApplication(type = ConditionalOnWebApplication.Type.SERVLET)// 这是spring-security-config包的注解，表示启用Spring Web Security@EnableWebSecuritypublic class WebSecurityEnablerConfiguration {} EnableWebSecurity.class 123456789101112131415161718@Retention(value = java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)@Target(value = { java.lang.annotation.ElementType.TYPE })@Documented@Import({ WebSecurityConfiguration.class, SpringWebMvcImportSelector.class, OAuth2ImportSelector.class })@EnableGlobalAuthentication@Configurationpublic @interface EnableWebSecurity { /** * Controls debugging support for Spring Security. Default is false. * @return if true, enables debug support with Spring Security */ boolean debug() default false;} 创建一个UserDetailsS​​ervice Bean 创建一个UserDetailsS​​ervice Bean，其中包含用户名user和随机生成的密码，并记录到控制台。 UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)@ConditionalOnClass(AuthenticationManager.class)@ConditionalOnBean(ObjectPostProcessor.class)@ConditionalOnMissingBean( value = { AuthenticationManager.class, AuthenticationProvider.class, UserDetailsService.class }, type = { "org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtDecoder", "org.springframework.security.oauth2.server.resource.introspection.OpaqueTokenIntrospector" })public class UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration { private static final String NOOP_PASSWORD_PREFIX = "{noop}"; private static final Pattern PASSWORD_ALGORITHM_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("^\\{.+}.*$"); private static final Log logger = LogFactory.getLog(UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration.class); @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean( type = "org.springframework.security.oauth2.client.registration.ClientRegistrationRepository") @Lazy public InMemoryUserDetailsManager inMemoryUserDetailsManager(SecurityProperties properties, ObjectProvider<PasswordEncoder> passwordEncoder) { SecurityProperties.User user = properties.getUser(); List<String> roles = user.getRoles(); return new InMemoryUserDetailsManager( User.withUsername(user.getName()).password(getOrDeducePassword(user, passwordEncoder.getIfAvailable())) .roles(StringUtils.toStringArray(roles)).build()); } private String getOrDeducePassword(SecurityProperties.User user, PasswordEncoder encoder) { String password = user.getPassword(); if (user.isPasswordGenerated()) { logger.info(String.format("%n%nUsing generated security password: %s%n", user.getPassword())); } if (encoder != null || PASSWORD_ALGORITHM_PATTERN.matcher(password).matches()) { return password; } return NOOP_PASSWORD_PREFIX + password; }} 注册过滤器Filter 针对每个请求，使用Servlet容器向名为springSecurityFilterChain的bean注册过滤器。 SecurityFilterAutoConfiguration 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)@ConditionalOnWebApplication(type = Type.SERVLET)@EnableConfigurationProperties(SecurityProperties.class)@ConditionalOnClass({ AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.class, SessionCreationPolicy.class })@AutoConfigureAfter(SecurityAutoConfiguration.class)public class SecurityFilterAutoConfiguration { private static final String DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME = AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME; @Bean @ConditionalOnBean(name = DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME) public DelegatingFilterProxyRegistrationBean securityFilterChainRegistration(SecurityProperties securityProperties) { DelegatingFilterProxyRegistrationBean registration = new DelegatingFilterProxyRegistrationBean(DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME); registration.setOrder(securityProperties.getFilter().getOrder()); registration.setDispatcherTypes(getDispatcherTypes(securityProperties)); return registration; } private EnumSet<DispatcherType> getDispatcherTypes(SecurityProperties securityProperties) { if (securityProperties.getFilter().getDispatcherTypes() == null) { return null; } return securityProperties.getFilter().getDispatcherTypes().stream() .map((type) -> DispatcherType.valueOf(type.name())) .collect(Collectors.collectingAndThen(Collectors.toSet(), EnumSet::copyOf)); }} 主要接口 @EnableWebSecurity @EnableWebMvcSecurity @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity @EnableGlobalAuthentication SecurityBuilder SecurityConfigurer SecurityConfigurerAdapter UserDetailsAwareConfigurer AbstractHttpConfigurer LdapAuthenticationProviderConfigurer GlobalAuthenticationConfigurerAdapter WebSecurityConfigurer WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter 注解EnableWebSecurity.class 1234567891011121314151617@Retention(value = java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)@Target(value = { java.lang.annotation.ElementType.TYPE })@Documented// 引入WebSecurityConfiguration.class、SpringWebMvcImportSelector.class、OAuth2ImportSelector.class这三个配置类@Import({ WebSecurityConfiguration.class, SpringWebMvcImportSelector.class, OAuth2ImportSelector.class })@EnableGlobalAuthentication@Configurationpublic @interface EnableWebSecurity { /** * Controls debugging support for Spring Security. Default is false. * @return if true, enables debug support with Spring Security */ boolean debug() default false;} 注解EnableGlobalAuthentication.class 123456789@Retention(value = java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)// 表示该注解可以注解Class, interface (including annotation type), or enum declaration@Target(value = { java.lang.annotation.ElementType.TYPE })@Documented// 引入AuthenticationConfiguration配置类@Import(AuthenticationConfiguration.class)@Configurationpublic @interface EnableGlobalAuthentication {} EnableGlobalAuthentication主要有两个作用 被@EnableGlobalAuthentication所注解的类，可以配置一个AuthenticationManagerBuilder的全局实体 被@EnableGlobalAuthentication所注解的注解类，该注解所修饰的类可以配置一个AuthenticationManagerBuilder的全局实体，@EnableGlobalAuthentication注解过的注解类有EnableWebSecurity、EnableWebMvcSecurity和EnableGlobalMethodSecurity，也就是说EnableWebSecurity、EnableWebMvcSecurity和EnableGlobalMethodSecurity注解过的类可以配置一个AuthenticationManagerBuilder的全局实体 WebSecurityConfiguration @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)public class WebSecurityConfiguration implements ImportAware, BeanClassLoaderAware { private WebSecurity webSecurity; private Boolean debugEnabled; private List<SecurityConfigurer<Filter, WebSecurity>> webSecurityConfigurers; private ClassLoader beanClassLoader; @Autowired(required = false) private ObjectPostProcessor<Object> objectObjectPostProcessor; // @Bean public static DelegatingApplicationListener delegatingApplicationListener() { return new DelegatingApplicationListener(); } @Bean @DependsOn(AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME) public SecurityExpressionHandler<FilterInvocation> webSecurityExpressionHandler() { return webSecurity.getExpressionHandler(); } /** * Creates the Spring Security Filter Chain * @return the {@link Filter} that represents the security filter chain * @throws Exception */ @Bean(name = AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME) public Filter springSecurityFilterChain() throws Exception { boolean hasConfigurers = webSecurityConfigurers != null && !webSecurityConfigurers.isEmpty(); if (!hasConfigurers) { WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter adapter = objectObjectPostProcessor .postProcess(new WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter() { }); webSecurity.apply(adapter); } return webSecurity.build(); } /** * Creates the {@link WebInvocationPrivilegeEvaluator} that is necessary for the JSP * tag support. * @return the {@link WebInvocationPrivilegeEvaluator} */ @Bean @DependsOn(AbstractSecurityWebApplicationInitializer.DEFAULT_FILTER_NAME) public WebInvocationPrivilegeEvaluator privilegeEvaluator() { return webSecurity.getPrivilegeEvaluator(); } /** * Sets the {@code <SecurityConfigurer<FilterChainProxy, WebSecurityBuilder>} * instances used to create the web configuration. * * @param objectPostProcessor the {@link ObjectPostProcessor} used to create a * {@link WebSecurity} instance * @param webSecurityConfigurers the * {@code <SecurityConfigurer<FilterChainProxy, WebSecurityBuilder>} instances used to * create the web configuration * @throws Exception */ @Autowired(required = false) public void setFilterChainProxySecurityConfigurer( ObjectPostProcessor<Object> objectPostProcessor, @Value("#{@autowiredWebSecurityConfigurersIgnoreParents.getWebSecurityConfigurers()}") List<SecurityConfigurer<Filter, WebSecurity>> webSecurityConfigurers) throws Exception { webSecurity = objectPostProcessor .postProcess(new WebSecurity(objectPostProcessor)); if (debugEnabled != null) { webSecurity.debug(debugEnabled); } webSecurityConfigurers.sort(AnnotationAwareOrderComparator.INSTANCE); Integer previousOrder = null; Object previousConfig = null; for (SecurityConfigurer<Filter, WebSecurity> config : webSecurityConfigurers) { Integer order = AnnotationAwareOrderComparator.lookupOrder(config); if (previousOrder != null && previousOrder.equals(order)) { throw new IllegalStateException( "@Order on WebSecurityConfigurers must be unique. Order of " + order + " was already used on " + previousConfig + ", so it cannot be used on " + config + " too."); } previousOrder = order; previousConfig = config; } for (SecurityConfigurer<Filter, WebSecurity> webSecurityConfigurer : webSecurityConfigurers) { webSecurity.apply(webSecurityConfigurer); } this.webSecurityConfigurers = webSecurityConfigurers; } @Bean public static BeanFactoryPostProcessor conversionServicePostProcessor() { return new RsaKeyConversionServicePostProcessor(); } @Bean public static AutowiredWebSecurityConfigurersIgnoreParents autowiredWebSecurityConfigurersIgnoreParents( ConfigurableListableBeanFactory beanFactory) { return new AutowiredWebSecurityConfigurersIgnoreParents(beanFactory); } /** * A custom verision of the Spring provided AnnotationAwareOrderComparator that uses * {@link AnnotationUtils#findAnnotation(Class, Class)} to look on super class * instances for the {@link Order} annotation. * * @author Rob Winch * @since 3.2 */ private static class AnnotationAwareOrderComparator extends OrderComparator { private static final AnnotationAwareOrderComparator INSTANCE = new AnnotationAwareOrderComparator(); @Override protected int getOrder(Object obj) { return lookupOrder(obj); } private static int lookupOrder(Object obj) { if (obj instanceof Ordered) { return ((Ordered) obj).getOrder(); } if (obj != null) { Class<?> clazz = (obj instanceof Class ? (Class<?>) obj : obj.getClass()); Order order = AnnotationUtils.findAnnotation(clazz, Order.class); if (order != null) { return order.value(); } } return Ordered.LOWEST_PRECEDENCE; } } /* * (non-Javadoc) * * @see org.springframework.context.annotation.ImportAware#setImportMetadata(org. * springframework.core.type.AnnotationMetadata) */ public void setImportMetadata(AnnotationMetadata importMetadata) { Map<String, Object> enableWebSecurityAttrMap = importMetadata .getAnnotationAttributes(EnableWebSecurity.class.getName()); AnnotationAttributes enableWebSecurityAttrs = AnnotationAttributes .fromMap(enableWebSecurityAttrMap); debugEnabled = enableWebSecurityAttrs.getBoolean("debug"); if (webSecurity != null) { webSecurity.debug(debugEnabled); } } /* * (non-Javadoc) * * @see * org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanClassLoaderAware#setBeanClassLoader(java. * lang.ClassLoader) */ public void setBeanClassLoader(ClassLoader classLoader) { this.beanClassLoader = classLoader; }}

posts.title: 微信小程序页面间通信
posts.slug: miniprogram/微信小程序页面间通信
posts.path: miniprogram/微信小程序页面间通信/
posts.text: preface微信小程序路由API api description wx.switchTab 跳转到 tabBar 页面，并关闭其他所有非 tabBar 页面 wx.reLaunch 关闭所有页面，打开到应用内的某个页面 wx.redirectTo 关闭当前页面，跳转到应用内的某个页面。但是不允许跳转到 tabbar 页面。 wx.navigateTo 保留当前页面，跳转到应用内的某个页面。但是不能跳到 tabbar 页面。使用 wx.navigateBack 可以返回到原页面。小程序中页面栈最多十层。 wx.navigateBack 关闭当前页面，返回上一页面或多级页面。可通过 getCurrentPages 获取当前的页面栈，决定需要返回几层。 微信小程序页面间通信可行方式原生页面间通信能力小程序基础库版本v2.7.3开始新增页面间通信接口 使用方法A页面–>B页面A页面执行跳转并传递数据 1234567wx.navigateTo({ url: 'b页面路径' success: function(res) { // 通过eventChannel向被打开页面传送数据 res.eventChannel.emit('acceptDataFromOpenerPage', { data: 'test' }) }}) B页面接收 12345678// 一般在页面生命周期函数onLoad中onLoad: function(option) { // 监听acceptDataFromOpenerPage事件，获取上一页面通过eventChannel传送到当前页面的数据 let eventChannel = this.getOpenerEventChannel(); eventChannel.on('acceptDataFromOpenerPage',function(data) { console.log(data) })} B页面–>A页面A页面打开B页面时,A页面先监听事件someEvent 12345678wx.navigateTo({ url: 'test?id=1', events: { someEvent: function(data) { console.log(data) } },}) B页面被打开后，在需要给A页面传递数据的地方触发A页面监听的事件someEvent 12const eventChannel = this.getOpenerEventChannel()eventChannel.emit('someEvent', {data: 'test'}); 实现原理TODO:实现原理 原生页面通信能力接口的限制如果一个页面b由另一个页面a通过 wx.navigateTo 打开，这两个页面间将建立一条数据通道如果b页面不是通过wx.navigateTo打开，那么b页面this.getOpenerEventChannel()获得的对象为空”{}” 第三方事件分发库onfire.js导入第三方库到项目页面事件监听与触发实现原理使用限制

posts.title: SpringSecurity的架构
posts.text: 前言（Preface） spring springmvc servlet api 认证授权方式 LDAP ACL SAML 2.0 OAUTH 2.0 OPENID CAS 模块（Project Modules） Core - spring-security-core.jar Remoting - spring-security-remoting.jar Web - spring-security-web.jar Config - spring-security-config.jar LDAP - spring-security-ldap.jar OAuth 2.0 Core - spring-security-oauth2-core.jar OAuth 2.0 Client - spring-security-oauth2-client.jar OAuth 2.0 JOSE - spring-security-oauth2-jose.jar OAuth 2.0 Resource Server - spring-security-oauth2-resource-server.jar ACL - spring-security-acl.jar CAS - spring-security-cas.jar OpenID - spring-security-openid.jar Test - spring-security-test.jar Spring Security Architecture 认证（Authentication）和授权（Authorization）大多数应用安全归结起来就主要是两个内容：认证和授权认证：解决你是谁的问题授权: 解决你能做什么的问题 认证（Authentication ） AuthenticationManager ProviderManager AuthenticationManagerDelegator in WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter NoOpAuthenticationManager in AbstractSecurityInterceptor AuthenticationManagerDelegator in GlobalMethodSecurityBeanDefinitionParser AuthenticationManagerDelegator in AuthenticationConfiguration Authentication Authentication Username and Password - how to authenticate with a username/password OAuth 2.0 Login - OAuth 2.0 Log In with OpenID Connect and non-standard OAuth 2.0 Login (i.e. GitHub) SAML 2.0 Login - SAML 2.0 Log In Central Authentication Server (CAS) - Central Authentication Server (CAS) Support Remember Me - How to remember a user past session expiration JAAS Authentication - Authenticate with JAAS OpenID - OpenID Authentication (not to be confused with OpenID Connect) Pre-Authentication Scenarios - Authenticate with an external mechanism such as SiteMinder or Java EE security but still use Spring Security for authorization and protection against common exploits. X509 Authentication - X509 Authentication 授权（Authorization）

posts.title: 微信小程序登录
posts.excerpt: 关于小程序登录的分析
posts.text: 关于小程序登录的分析 微信小程序有关登录授权的主要接口wx.login(Object object)wx.getUserInfo(Object object)wx.authorize(Object object) 属性 类型 说明 userInfo UserInfo 用户信息对象，不包含 openid 等敏感信息 rawData string 不包括敏感信息的原始数据字符串，用于计算签名 signature string 使用 sha1( rawData + sessionkey ) 得到字符串，用于校验用户信息，详见 用户数据的签名验证和加解密 encryptedData string 包括敏感数据在内的完整用户信息的加密数据，详见 用户数据的签名验证和加解密 iv string 加密算法的初始向量，详见 用户数据的签名验证和加解密 cloudID string 敏感数据对应的云 ID，开通云开发的小程序才会返回，可通过云调用直接获取开放数据，详细见云调用直接获取开放数据 1.打开小程序，app.js 执行onLaounch()2.onLaounch()中调用wx.login()得到code发送给后台3.后台使用code换取会话密钥seesion_key、openId等，后台生成临时凭证（与openId、seesion_key关联），返回给小程序4.小程序保存临时凭证，小程序判断是否有自定义凭证，没有或自定义凭证失效则进入index页面，选择登录方式5.选择微信登录，调用接口wx.getUserInfo获取userInfo，将加密信息与临时凭证发送给后台，后台接收到加密信息与临时凭证并找到关联的openId、session_key，后台通过session_key解析加密信息，通过openId查找是否有关联系统账户，有则将解密后信息更新到系统账户并返回自定义凭证token，没有则返回登录失败。 questions微信小程序登录的几种情况?

posts.title: springboot的starter原理
posts.text: 对springboot的starter模式的探究 springboot只需添加starter包便会自动引入相关依赖包，于是创建springboot工程，使用maven，尝试springboot引入starter，在ide中我查看starter，其jar包里只有很少的目录和文件，没有找到pom等依赖文件，于是我去查看springboot源码，选择一个springboot的starter查看，spring-boot/spring-boot-project/spring-boot-starters/spring-boot-starter-data-jpa，在该目录下有gradle依赖文件build.gradle，其中可以看见其依赖的信息，但是maven repository中的jar包里没有找到任何依赖文件（TODO:还有待继续研究）

posts.title: 微信小程序开发总结（一）
posts.slug: miniprogram/微信小程序开发总结（一）
posts.path: miniprogram/微信小程序开发总结（一）/
posts.text: ios真机环境下Promise对象默认不支持finally方法123456789101112//兼容ios真机环境下Promise对象不存在finally方法if (!Promise.prototype.finally) { Promise.prototype.finally = function (callback) { this.then( res => { callback && callback(res) }, error => { callback && callback(error) }) }} hover-class设置问题view和button组件的样式与hover-class样式设置同属性时失效，如background-color等， 原因是因为hover类似css伪类，与声明顺序有关，类似css伪类:link、:hover、:active和:visited，也就是说在wxss中hover-class的声明必须在class声明之后， wxml 1<view class="test" hover-class="hover"/> wxss 1234567891011121314151617/**hover 必须在test之前声明失效*/.hover{ background-color:red}.test{ background-color:yellow}/**hover 必须在test之后声明才有效*/.hover{ background-color:red} Button 按钮去除原生边框等样式123456789101112131415/* button 去除边框 */button { margin: 0; padding: 0; position: static; background-color: transparent;}button:after { content: none;}button::after { border: none;} 页面间通信接口如果一个页面b由另一个页面a通过 wx.navigateTo 打开，这两个页面间将建立一条数据通道如果b页面部署通过wx.navigateTo打开，那么b页面this.getOpenerEventChannel()获得的对象为空”{}”

posts.title: powershell 美化
posts.text: oh-my-posh & posh-gitOh-My-Posh 为 PowerShell 提示符提供主题功能。Posh-Git 将 Git 状态信息添加到提示，并为 Git 命令、参数、远程和分支名称添加 tab 自动补全。 安装在powershell中运行 123Install-Module -Name PSReadLine -AllowPrerelease -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck # PSReadLineInstall-Module posh-git -Scope CurrentUser # posh-gitInstall-Module oh-my-posh -Scope CurrentUser # oh-my-posh 配置打开powershell的配置文件 windows 1notepad.exe $Profile linux 1nano $Profile 设置以下内容 1234567891011121314151617181920212223Import-Module posh-git # 引入 posh-gitImport-Module oh-my-posh # 引入 oh-my-poshSet-Theme Paradox # 设置主题为 ParadoxSet-PSReadlineKeyHandler -Key Tab -Function Complete # 设置 Tab 键补全Set-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key "Ctrl+d" -Function MenuComplete # 设置 Ctrl+d 为菜单补全和 IntellisenseSet-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key "Ctrl+z" -Function Undo # 设置 Ctrl+z 为撤销Set-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key UpArrow -Function HistorySearchBackward # 设置向上键为后向搜索历史记录Set-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key DownArrow -Function HistorySearchForward # 设置向下键为前向搜索历史纪录# 一些PSReadline配置$PSReadLineOptions = @{ EditMode = "Emacs" HistoryNoDuplicates = $true HistorySearchCursorMovesToEnd = $true Colors = @{ # 提示文字颜色，原来的颜色太浅了，我这里换了 Prediction = '#8F8B8B' }}Set-PSReadLineOption @PSReadLineOptions font安装支持powerline字体推荐字体 FiraCode cascadia-code 设置

posts.title: powershell 的一些相关配置
posts.text: version查看powershell版本 123$PSVersionTable$PSVersionTable.PSVersion$PSVersionTable.BuildVersion Execution Policies查看与设置powershell执行策略的命令pwoershell 执行策略 | Microsoft Docs 123456### 查看执行策略get-ExecutionPolicy### 设置执行策略set-ExecutionPolicy [RemoteSigned|Restricted]### RemoteSigned ### Restricted Option1-WorkingDirectory ~
